content_body: We so enjoyed our time in the mountains. Your home is absolutely stunning and was the perfect place for our family of 6. We enjoyed all the sunsets and amazing views from the porches. Morning coffee and Bible reading was such a delight by the porch fireplace. our children loved playing pool and enjoyed the arcade. You helped make this a wonderful time for our first visit to Blue Ridge. Blessing on your home for all those who visit in the future.  ~The Rowletts
title: A COVID Getaway
